text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is running in the Japan Cup. As
expected, Kitasan Black is here as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition, an Umamusume that Kitasan Black
admires, Tokai Teio, is running as well. She also
happens to be a rival of Mejiro McQueen's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black are
racing against Tokai Teio!
